product.name: ASD Trimless LED Recessed Lighting 4 Inch, 15W 120-277V Dimmable Commercial Lights with J-Box, 5 CCT 2700K-5000K, CRI 90+, IC Rated, ETL, Energy Star, White, 18 Pack
features: ✅ DESIGN - ASD LED trimless recessed lighting has a twist-lock design and includes a round mud frame to be plastered over, giving it a smooth trimless look. Our 4 inch LED recessed lights have a durable airtight aluminum housing, multifaceted specular reflector with a 38° beam angle, and anti-glare PC lens. These down lights for ceiling are designed to operate on 120-277V circuits with a 0-10V dimmable driver
✅ COLOR SELECTABLE - You can choose either a 2700K soft white, 3000K warm white, 3500K neutral white, 4000K cool white, or 5000K daylight color temperature
✅ CRI90+ Rating provides rich and natural colors and keeps your space looking and feeling vibrant. True bright colors also improve your mood and general health

✅ INSTALLATION - This trimless recess light is IC rated so there is no can or any other housing required. Our LED ceiling light fixture is also Wet Locations rated, making it perfect for any spaces with humidity requirements. Perfect for retail, hospitality, or any other commercial space with a high ceiling. Template size for installation is 3 3/4" (95mm)

✅ ADVANTAGES - With a lifespan of 50000 hours, these fixtures are made to last decades under normal operation! ASD provides a 5-year limited warranty along with ETL and Energy Star certifications to guarantee top quality products and safety!
✅ ACCESSORIES (sold separately) - Emergency battery backup kit 8W - BLD-HM08D (B0DBJ1Q3YY); 15W - BLD-HM15D (B0CS3VWYHS)
